title: Failed to retrieve the histogram metadata record for the newly added indexes
poc: CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT, b INT, c INT);
CREATE TABLE t2 (a INT, b INT, c INT);
CREATE TABLE t3 (a INT, b INT, c INT);
CREATE TABLE t4 (a INT, b INT, c INT);
-- Wait for stats to be fully loaded
SELECT t2.a, t2.b, t3.a, t3.b, t4.a, t4.b
ON t3.a = 1 AND t3.b = t2.b AND t2.b = t4.b
key_bug_features: Creating index on table triggers histogram metadata retrieval failure
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t5 (d VARCHAR(10), e FLOAT, f DATE);
SELECT t5.d, t5.e, t5.f FROM t5 WHERE e > 1.0;
CREATE TABLE t6 (g INT, h INT DEFAULT 0, i TIMESTAMP NULL);
